original_title: ATID-438 I Hate This Dirty Old Man, But I Spent The Next 3 Days Tearfully Getting Fucked By Him Ichika Matsumoto I Hate This Dirty Old Man, But I Spent The Next 3 Days Tearfully Getting Fucked By Him Ichika Matsumoto
overview: My mom changed when I started dating Fukai-san. It's fashionable and I'm always in a good mood. If I think of mom's happiness, I have to be happy ... I was not good at Mr. Fukai. For three days without mom, Mr. Fukai kept asking for me. Forever, forever ... regrettable, painful ... I couldn't stop crying.
